# hetzner_subnet (Data Source)

Reads details of a Hetzner subnet.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_subnet" "example" {
  ip = "203.0.113.0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The subnet IP address.

### Read-Only

- `failover` (Boolean) Whether this is a failover subnet.
- `gateway` (String) The subnet gateway.
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the subnet is locked.
- `mask` (Number) The CIDR notation.
- `server_ip` (String) The server main IP this subnet is assigned to.
- `server_number` (Number) The server ID this subnet is assigned to.
- `traffic_daily` (Number) Daily traffic limit in MB.
- `traffic_hourly` (Number) Hourly traffic limit in MB.
- `traffic_monthly` (Number) Monthly traffic limit in GB.
- `traffic_warnings` (Boolean) Whether traffic warnings are enabled.
